raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Atalija to Pils
Karra-Wihru ( un ) to Lauschu
Kleegſchanu dsirdeja / nahze ta
pee term Laudim eekſch ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un skattijahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rangi/ tad stahweja tas
Kehniſch ta KUNGA Nammá
pee ta Pihlara/ ta ka Geradduns
bija/ un tee Trummeteri/ un
Dseedatajt bja apkahrt to keh-
nixu/ un wiſſi Laudis tahs Sem-
mes preezajahs / un puhte ar
Trummetehm. Tad faplohsfija A-
talija fawas Drehbes/ un fanze:
Dumpis/ Dumpis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Preesteris Joja-
dus pawebleja teem Kaptei-
nehm/ kas pahr to Karra-Speh-
ku bija eezelti/un fazzijaus teeni:
Isweddeet winnu no Namma
ahra us Pagalimu/ un kas win-
xai pakkatstaiga / tas lai zaur
Sohbinu nomirst/ jo tas Preeste-
rts fazzija/ lai winna ta KUN-
GA Nammá ne tohp nokauta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee peelikke Rohkas
pee tahs/ un ta eegahje us to Zet-
tu/ fur tee Sirgi us ta Kehnixa
Nammu eet/ un tappe tur no-
kauta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jojadus darrija wee-
nu Derribu starp to KUNGU/
un starp to Kehnixu/ un starp
teeu Laudim/ ka tee ta KUN-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze wiſſi Laudis
tahs Semmes Báila Namina/
un nolausija to ar winna Alta-
reem/ un fadausija winna Bildes
itt labbi/ un nokawe Matanit
Báila Swehtitaju preeſch teem
Altareem/ un tas Preesteris is-
taisija attak tohs Ammatus pee
ta KUNGA Namina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch nehme tohs
Kapteines/ un Wirfneekus / un
Pils Karra-Wihrus/ un wiſſig
tahs Semmes Laudis / un tee
nowedde to Kehnixu no ta KUN-
GA Namma / un gahje us to
Zettu no to Pils Karra-Wihru
Wahrtim us ta Kehnixa Nam-
mu/ un wiſſch apfehdahs us to
Kehnixu Gohda-Krehflu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi tahs Semmes
Laudis preezajahs/ untas Pils-
sahts norimme/ pehz to/ kad tee
Ataliju ar Sohbinu bij nokau-
wuschi pee ta Kehnixa Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Joas bija feptius
Gaddus wezz/ kad tas par Keh-
nixu tappē.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
